pr.title: update function names in stage to match conventions
pr.author: snuffysasa

summary: Renamed a block of stage-related functions from lower_snake_case or raw func_80224xxx names to the project’s Stage_* naming convention, then propagated those symbol-name changes through stage.c, stage.h, include/functions.h, and many assembly callsites. The PR appears to be a naming-only cleanup: changed line counts are balanced and the diff excerpt shows identical instructions/call addresses with only callee labels updated.
what_changed: Renamed camera-bound accessor functions such as get_cam_bounds_left_offset/right/top/bottom to Stage_GetCamBoundsLeftOffset, Stage_GetCamBoundsRightOffset, Stage_GetCamBoundsTopOffset, and Stage_GetCamBoundsBottomOffset.

Renamed stage camera accessors including get_cam_pan_angle_radians, get_cam_max_depth, get_cam_zoom_rate, get_cam_info_x20, get_cam_info_x24, get_cam_fixed_zoom, get_cam_track_ratio, get_cam_track_smooth, and get_cam_fixed_fov to Stage_Get* forms.

Renamed blast-zone accessors get_blast_zone_right_offset/left/top/bottom to Stage_GetBlastZoneRightOffset, Stage_GetBlastZoneLeftOffset, Stage_GetBlastZoneTopOffset, and Stage_GetBlastZoneBottomOffset.

Renamed pause camera and camera-angle helpers to Stage_GetPauseCamZPosMin, Stage_GetPauseCamZPosInit, Stage_GetPauseCamZPosMax, Stage_GetCamAngleRadiansUp, Stage_GetCamAngleRadiansDown, Stage_GetCamAngleRadiansLeft, and Stage_GetCamAngleRadiansRight.

Converted partially descriptive or unknown stage helpers to Stage-prefixed names, including calc_unk_cam_y_80224B98 to Stage_CalcUnkCamY, calc_unk_cam_y_bounds_80224BC4 to Stage_CalcUnkCamYBounds, unk_set_vec3_to_cam_offset_80224BF8 to Stage_UnkSetVec3TCam_Offset, set_vec_to_fixed_cam_pos to Stage_SetVecToFixedCamPos, and several func_80224xxx/func_80225xxx symbols to Stage_80224xxx/Stage_80225xxx.
Updated declarations in src/melee/gr/stage.h and include/functions.h to match the renamed implementations.
Updated assembly branch-and-link operands across 43 files so unresolved assembly references point at the new Stage_* symbols.
smart_moves: Performed the rename consistently across C definitions, public headers, global function declarations, and handwritten assembly references, avoiding mixed old/new symbol names.

Kept unknown functions address-preserving by using Stage_80224CAC, Stage_80224DC8, Stage_80224E38, Stage_80224E64, Stage_80224FDC, Stage_80225074, Stage_80225194, Stage_8022519C, Stage_802251B4, Stage_802251E8, Stage_8022524C, Stage_80225298, Stage_802252E4, and Stage_8022532C rather than inventing semantics not supported by the code.

Used a subsystem prefix for even well-understood accessors, making cross-module callsites in camera, fighter, item, ground, interface, and map code immediately identifiable as stage-system dependencies.
Preserved matching risk by changing symbol text only; assembly instruction bytes and branch offsets shown in the diff excerpt remain unchanged.
decomp_lessons: Large symbol renames in a mixed C/assembly decomp tree must include every assembly callsite, not just C prototypes and definitions.
Subsystem-prefixed names such as Stage_GetCamZoomRate are preferable to generic accessors such as get_cam_zoom_rate because many systems consume stage data.
When a function is not fully understood, keep its address in the name under the subsystem prefix instead of over-describing behavior.
Header synchronization is part of a successful rename: stage.h and include/functions.h were updated alongside stage.c.
Balanced added/deleted line counts in a rename PR are useful evidence that the change is maintenance/naming rather than logic modification.
naming_conventions: Use Stage_ as the prefix for stage subsystem functions.
Use PascalCase after the subsystem prefix for descriptive function names, e.g. Stage_GetCamBoundsLeftOffset and Stage_GetBlastZoneBottomOffset.
Use Get for simple accessors of stage_info fields and derived offsets.
Use Calc for derived camera calculations where the function computes a value rather than directly returning a field.
Retain numeric addresses for unknown or insufficiently understood functions, e.g. Stage_80224CAC, instead of leaving generic func_ names outside the subsystem namespace.
Camera and blast-zone direction words are ordered as part of the descriptive suffix: LeftOffset, RightOffset, TopOffset, BottomOffset, Up, Down, Left, Right.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Assembly callsites were updated by renaming the bl target label only, e.g. bl get_cam_bounds_left_offset became bl Stage_GetCamBoundsLeftOffset while the encoded address/comment remained the same.
Callsite propagation covered many assembly modules, including camera.s, ft/code_8008521C.s, it/code_8027CF30.s, gr stage files, gm/code_801601C4.s, if/ifmagnify.s, text_2.s, and text_4.s.
The diff shows no evidence of instruction scheduling or codegen changes; this was a symbol-table/name alignment pass.
For decomp work, rename exported C functions only after identifying all dependent asm references, because stale branch labels would break assembly or linking.
review_feedback: No issue comments, review comments, or reviews were present in the provided PR slice.
The stated motivation came from the title/body only: updating function names in stage to match conventions.
follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that rename Stage_80224CAC or other Stage_80224xxx placeholders to semantic names.
Search for remaining lower_snake_case stage accessors that should follow the Stage_* convention.
Audit assembly references to Stage_* functions before moving more stage code from asm to C.
Check whether Stage_UnkSetVec3TCam_Offset was later corrected or renamed, since the name is still marked uncertain.
